agentBenchmarks.pageDescription: Run available AI benchmarks against live admin data, preserve every run, and score generated output.

start.autonomousDescription: This cron job uses its production instructions. The run is scored by an AI judge after the workflow finishes.
start.description: Quote, order, and product benchmarks compare generated data to a selected target and score the run with deterministic checks plus an AI judge. Autonomous cron benchmarks use their production instructions.

start.noProducts: No products available for this channel.
start.noQuotes: No quotes available for this channel.

start.productHelp: {{count}} attributes will be used as the expected output.
start.promptHelp: The prompt is preserved with the benchmark run for later comparisons.

agentBenchmarks.superAdminOnlyDescription: AI benchmark runs use live data and are only available to Super Admin users.
